Concept: Pretreated Battery Materials

Creator

Description

These are active battery materials which include cobalt, lithium, and manganese.

Usage List:

  • Appears as Pretreated Battery Materials in Diagram Recycle in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Pretreated Battery Materials in Diagram Pretreat Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Pretreated Battery Materials in Diagram Mechanically/Chemically Pretreat Material in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Pretreated Battery Materials in Diagram Pyrometallurgy in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Pretreated Battery Materials in Diagram Hydrometallurgy in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
